name: Absorb
description: Grants %{VALUE:FORAGING_WISDOM} %{STAT:FORAGING_WISDOM} and %{VALUE:FORAGING_FORTUNE} %{STAT:FORAGING_FORTUNE}.

name: Angler
description: Grants %{VALUE:SEA_CREATURE_CHANCE} %{STAT:SEA_CREATURE_CHANCE}.

name: Aqua Affinity
description: Increases your underwater mining rate.

name: Bane of Arthropods
description: Increases damage dealt to %{MOB_TYPE:ARTHROPOD} mobs by %{VALUE:DAMAGE}.

name: Big Brain
description: Grants %{VALUE:INTELLIGENCE} %{STAT:INTELLIGENCE}.

name: Blast Protection
description: Grants %{VALUE:EXPLOSION_DEFENSE} %{STAT:DEFENSE} against explosions.

name: Blessing
description: Increases the chance for %{KEYWORD:TREASURE} catches to be %{KEYWORD:TREASURE_GREAT} or %{KEYWORD:TREASURE_OUSTANDING} by %{VALUE:CHANCE}.

name: Caster
description: %{VALUE:CHANCE} chance to not consume bait.

name: Cayenne
description: Grants %{VALUE:HEALTH_SCALAR} %{STAT:HEALTH} and %{VALUE:TRUE_DEFENSE_SCALAR} %{STAT:TRUE_DEFENSE} per digit in your %{KEYWORD:MAGICAL_POWER}

name: Champion
description: Gain %{VALUE:COMBAT_XP} extra Combat XP. The 2nd hit on a mob grants %{VALUE:COINS} & %{VALUE:XP_ORBS} exp orbs.

name: Chance
description: Increases the chance of a Monster dropping an item by %{VALUE:DROP_CHANCE}.

name: Charm
description: Increases the chance to receive higher-tiered Trophy Fish by %{VALUE:CHANCE}.

name: Cleave
description: Deals up to %{VALUE:MORE_DAMAGE} of your damage dealt to other monsters within %{VALUE:DISTANCE} blocks of the target.

name: Compact
description: Gain %{VALUE:MINING_WISDOM} %{STAT:MINING_WISDOM} and a %{VALUE:CHANCE} to drop an enchanted item.

name: Corruption
description: Gain a %{VALUE:CHANCE} to spawn a Corrupted Sea Creature.

name: Counter-Strike
description: Gain %{VALUE:COUNTER_DEFENSE} %{STAT:DEFENSE} for %{VALUE:DURATION} on the first hit from an enemy.

name: Critical
description: Increases %{STAT:CRIT_DAMAGE} by %{VALUE:CRIT_DAMAGE}.

name: Cubism
description: Increases damage dealt to %{MOB_TYPE:CUBIC} mobs by %{VALUE:DAMAGE}.

name: Cultivating
description: Grants %{VALUE:FARMING_WISDOM} %{STAT:FARMING_WISDOM} and %{VALUE:FARMING_FORTUNE} %{STAT:FARMING_FORTUNE}.

name: Dedication
description: Grants %{VALUE:FARMING_FORTUNE_SCALAR} %{STAT:FARMING_FORTUNE} for crops, multiplied by your %{ZONE:GARDEN}

name: Delicate
description: Avoids breaking stems and baby crops.

name: Depth Strider
description: Reduces how much you are slowed in the water by %{VALUE:WATER_SPEED}.

name: Divine Gift
description: Grants %{VALUE:MAGIC_FIND} %{STAT:MAGIC_FIND}.

name: Dragon Tracer
description: Arrows home towards dragons if they are within %{VALUE:DISTANCE} blocks.

name: Drain
description: Heals for %{VALUE:HEAL} of your max health per %{VALUE:PER_CD} %{STAT:CRIT_DAMAGE} you deal per hit, up to %{VALUE:MAX_CD} %{STAT:CRIT_DAMAGE}.

name: Efficiency
description: Grants %{VALUE:MINING_SPEED} %{STAT:MINING_SPEED}.

name: Ender Slayer
description: Increases damage dealt to %{MOB_TYPE:ENDER} mobs by %{VALUE:DAMAGE}.

name: Execute
description: Increases damage dealt by %{VALUE:DAMAGE} for each percent of health missing on your target.

name: Experience
description: Grants a %{VALUE:CHANCE} chance for mobs and ores to drop double experience.

name: Expertise
description: Grants %{VALUE:SEA_CREATURE_CHANCE} %{STAT:SEA_CREATURE_CHANCE} and %{VALUE:FISHING_WISDOM} %{STAT:FISHING_WISDOM} when killing Sea Creatures.

name: Feather Falling
description: Increases how high you can fall before taking fall damage by %{VALUE:FALL_DISTANCE} and reduces fall damage by %{VALUE:FALL_DAMAGE}.

name: Ferocious Mana
description: Gain %{VALUE:MANA_STAT} of mana used near you as %{STAT:FEROCITY} for 10 seconds, capped at 50 %{STAT:FEROCITY}.

name: Fire Aspect
description: Ignites your enemies for %{VALUE:DURATION}, dealing %{VALUE:FIRE_DAMAGE} of your damage per second.

name: Fire Protection
description: Grants %{VALUE:FIRE_DEFENSE} %{STAT:TRUE_DEFENSE} against fire and lava.

name: First Strike
description: Increases melee damage dealt by %{VALUE:DAMAGE} for the first hit on a mob.

name: Flame
description: Arrows ignite your enemies for %{VALUE:DURATION}, dealing %{VALUE:FIRE_DAMAGE} of your damage per second.

name: Forest Pledge
description: Grants %{VALUE:FORAGING_FORTUNE} %{STAT:FORAGING_FORTUNE}.

name: Fortune
description: Grants %{VALUE:MINING_FORTUNE} %{STAT:MINING_FORTUNE}.

name: Frail
description: Sea Creatures start with %{VALUE:LESS_HEALTH} reduced health.

name: Giant Killer
description: Increases damage dealt by %{VALUE:SCALE_DAMAGE} for each percent of extra health that your target has above you up to %{VALUE:MAX_SCALAR}.

name: Gravity
description: Increases damage dealt to %{MOB_TYPE:AIRBORNE} mobs by %{VALUE:DAMAGE}.

name: Green Thumb
description: Grants %{VALUE:FARMING_FORTUNE} %{STAT:FARMING_FORTUNE} pet unique visitor served.

name: Growth
description: Grants %{VALUE:HEALTH} %{STAT:HEALTH}.

name: Hardened Mana
description: Gain %{VALUE:MANA_STAT} of mana used near you as %{STAT:DEFENSE} for 10 seconds, capped at 400 %{STAT:DEFENSE}.

name: Harvesting
description: Grants %{VALUE:FARMING_FORTUNE} %{STAT:FARMING_FORTUNE}.

name: Hecatomb
description:
Gain %{VALUE:CATACOMBS_XP} %{KEYWORDS:CATACOMB} XP & %{VALUE:CLASS_XP} %{KEYWORD:CLASS} XP, doubled on %{KEYWORD:S_PLUS} runs.
Grants %{VALUE:HEALTH}%{SYMBOL:HEALTH} per 10 %{KEYWORD:CATACOMBS} levels.

name: Ice Cold
description: Grants %{VALUE:COLD_RESISTANCE} %{STAT:COLD_RESISTANCE}.

name: Infinite Quiver
description: Saves arrows %{VALUE:ARROW_SAVE} of the time when you fire your bow. Disabled while sneaking.

name: Impaling
description: Increases damage dealt to %{MOB_TYPE:AQUATIC} mobs by %{VALUE:DAMAGE}.

name: Knockback
description: Increases knockback by %{VALUE:DISTANCE} blocks.

name: Lapidary
description: Grants %{VALUE:GEMSTONE_FORTUNE} %{STAT:GEMSTONE_FORTUNE} and %{VALUE:GEMSTONE_MINING_SPEED} %{STAT:MINING_SPEED} while mining Gemstones.

name: Lethality
description: Reduces the %{STAT:DEFENSE} of your target by %{VALUE:REDUCED} for %{VALUE:DURATION} each time you hit them with melee. Stacks up to %{VALUE:MAX_STACKS} times.

name: Life Steal
description: Heals for %{VALUE:HEAL} of your max health each time you hit a mob.

name: Looting
description: Increases the chance of a Monster dropping an item by %{VALUE:DROP_CHANCE}.

name: Luck
description: Increases the chance for Monsters to drop their armor by %{VALUE:CHANCE}.

name: Luck of the Sea
description: Grants %{VALUE:TREASURE_CHANCE} %{STAT:TREASURE_CHANCE}.

name: Lure
description: Shortens the maximum time it takes to catch something by %{VALUE:TIME_REDUCTION}.

name: Mana Steal
description: Regain %{VALUE:MANA} of your mana on hit.

name: Mana Vampire
description: Heal for %{VALUE:MANA_STAT} of mana used near you.

name: Magnet
description: Grants %{VALUE:MORE_EXP} additional experience orbs every time you successfully catch a fish.

name: Overload
description: Increases %{STAT:CRIT_DAMAGE} by %{VALUE:CRIT_DAMAGE} and %{STAT:CRIT_CHANCE} by %{VALUE:CRIT_CHANCE}. Having a Critical chance above %{VALUE:ABOVE_100} grants a chance to perform a Mega Critical Hit dealing %{VALUE:MEGA_CRIT_DAMAGE} extra damage.

name: Paleontologist
description: Increases chances of finding a %{KEYWORD:SUSPICIOUS_SCRAP} when mining in %{ZONE:GLACITE_MINESHAFT} by %{VALUE:CHANCE}.

name: Pesterminator
description: Grants %{VALUE:FARMING_FORTUNE} %{STAT:FARMING_FORTUNE} and %{VALUE:BONUS_PEST_CHANCE} %{STAT:BONUS_PEST_CHANCE}.

name: Piercing
description: Arrows travel through enemies. The extra targets take %{VALUE:PIERCING_DAMAGE} of the damage.

name: Piscary
description: Grants %{VALUE:FISHING_SPEED} %{STAT:FISHING_SPEED}.

name: Power
description: Increases bow damage by %{VALUE:DAMAGE}.

name: Prismatic
description: Grants %{VALUE:PRISTINE} %{STAT:PRISTINE}.

name: Projectile Protection
description: Grants %{VALUE:PROJECTILE_DEFENSE} %{STAT:DEFENSE} against projectiles.

name: Prosecute
description: Increases damage dealt by %{VALUE:DAMAGE} for each percent of health your target has.

name: Prosperity
description: Grants %{VALUE:HEALTH} %{STAT:HEALTH}.

name: Protection
description: Grants %{VALUE:DEFENSE} %{STAT:DEFENSE}.

name: Punch
description: Increases arrow knockback by %{VALUE:KNOCKBACK} blocks.

name: Quantum
description: Grants %{VALUE:WEEKDAY_VITALITY} %{STAT:VITALITY} on weekdays and %{VALUE:WEEKEND_WISDOM}%{SYMBOL:COMBAT_WISDOM} of a random %{KEYWORD:WISDOM} stat on weekends.

name: Quick Bite
description: Makes fish swim %{VALUE:SWIM_SPEED} faster towards your bobber.

name: Reflection
description:
Grants %{VALUE:INTELLIGENCE} %{STAT:INTELLIGENCE}.
Grants %{VALUE:TRUE_DEFENSE} %{STAT:TRUE_DEFENSE}.
When damage by an arrow, deal %{VALUE:INTEL_MULTIPLIER} your %{STAT:INTELLIGENCE} to its shooter.

name: Rejuvenate
description: Grants %{VALUE:HEALTH_REGEN} %{STAT:HEALTH_REGEN}.

name: Replenish
description: Upon breaking crops, nether wart, or cocoa, automatically replant from materials in your inventory.

name: Respiration
description: Grants %{VALUE:RESPIRATION} %{STAT:RESPIRATION}.

name: Respite
description: Grants %{VALUE:HEALTH_REGEN} %{STAT:HEALTH_REGEN} while out of combat.

name: Scavenger
description: Scavenge %{VALUE:COINS} per monster level on kill.

name: Scuba
description: Grants %{VALUE:PRESSURE_RESISTANCE} %{STAT:PRESSURE_RESISTANCE}.

name: Sharpness
description: Increases melee damage dealt by %{VALUE:DAMAGE}.

name: Silk Touch
description: Allows you to collect normally unobtainable block drops.

name: Small Brain
description: Grants %{VALUE:INTELLIGENCE} %{STAT:INTELLIGENCE} and %{VALUE:TRUE_DEFENSE} %{STAT:TRUE_DEFENSE}.

name: Smarty Pants
description: Grants %{VALUE:INTELLIGENCE} %{STAT:INTELLIGENCE}.

name: Smelting Touch
description: Automatically smelts broken blocks into their smelted form.

name: Smite
description: Increases damage dealt to %{MOB_TYPE:WITHER}, %{MOB_TYPE:SKELETAL} and %{MOB_TYPE:UNDEAD} mobs by %{VALUE:DAMAGE}.

name: Smoldering
description: Increases damage dealt to %{MOB_TYPE:INFERNAL} mobs by %{VALUE:DAMAGE}.

name: Snipe
description: Arrows deal %{VALUE:DISTANCE_DAMAGE} damage for every %{VALUE:DISTANCE} blocks traveled.

name: Spiked Hook
description: Fishing rod deals %{VALUE:MORE_DAMAGE} more damage to monsters.

name: Stealth
description: Causes timid creatures that normally flee to remain still.

name: Strong Mana
description: Gain %{VALUE:MANA_STAT} of mana used near you as %{STAT:STRENGTH} for 10 seconds, capped at 100 %{STAT:STRENGTH}.

name: Sugar Rush
description: Grants %{VALUE:WALK_SPEED} %{STAT:WALK_SPEED}.

name: Sunder
description: Grants %{VALUE:FARMING_FORTUNE} %{STAT:FARMING_FORTUNE}.

name: Tabasco
description: Grants %{VALUE:WEAPON_DAMAGE} weapon damage if you don't have a %{FORMAT:DARK_PURPLE}Dragon %{FORMAT:GRAY}pet equipped.

name: Thorns
description: Grants a %{VALUE:CHANCE} to rebound %{VALUE:REFLECT_DAMAGE} of damage dealt back at the attacker.

name: Thunderbolt
description: Every %{VALUE:HITS} hits on a monster, strike %{FORMAT:YELLOW}lightning%{FORMAT:GRAY}, dealing %{VALUE:HIT_DAMAGE} of the hit's damage to up to 10 monsters within 2 blocks.

name: Thunderlord
description: Every %{VALUE:HITS} hits on a monster, strike %{FORMAT:YELLOW}lightning%{FORMAT:GRAY}, dealing %{VALUE:HIT_DAMAGE} of the hit's damage.

name: Tidal
description: Increases your %{STAT:DEFENSE} by %{VALUE:SCC_DEFENSE} against Sea Creatures.

name: Titan Killer
description: Increases damage dealt by %{VALUE:SCALE_DAMAGE} for every 100 defense your target has up to %{VALUE:MAX_SCALAR}

name: Toxophilite
description: Gain %{VALUE:COMBAT_XP} extra Combat XP. Grants %{VALUE:CRIT_CHANCE} %{STAT:CRIT_CHANCE}.

name: Transylvanian
description: Heal %{VALUE:HEAL_SCALE}%{SYMBOL:HEALTH}/s per enemy within %{VALUE:DISTANCE} blocks, up to %{VALUE:HEAL_MAX}%{SYMBOL:HEALTH}/s.

name: True Protection
description: Grants %{VALUE:TRUE_DEFENSE} %{STAT:TRUE_DEFENSE}.

name: Triple-Strike
description: Increases melee damage dealt by %{VALUE:DAMAGE} for the first three hits on a mob.

name: Turbo-Cacti
description: Grants %{VALUE:CACTUS_FORTUNE} %{STAT:CACTUS_FORTUNE}.

name: Turbo-Cane
description: Grants %{VALUE:SUGAR_CANE_FORTUNE} %{STAT:SUGAR_CANE_FORTUNE}.

name: Turbo-Carrot
description: Grants %{VALUE:CARROT_FORTUNE} %{STAT:CARROT_FORTUNE}.

name: Turbo-Cocoa
description: Grants %{VALUE:COCOA_BEANS_FORTUNE} %{STAT:COCOA_BEANS_FORTUNE}.

name: Turbo-Melon
description: Grants %{VALUE:MELON_SLICE_FORTUNE} %{STAT:MELON_SLICE_FORTUNE}.

name: Turbo-Mushrooms
description: Grants %{VALUE:MUSHROOM_FORTUNE} %{STAT:MUSHROOM_FORTUNE}.

name: Turbo-Potato
description: Grants %{VALUE:POTATO_FORTUNE} %{STAT:POTATO_FORTUNE}.

name: Turbo-Pumpkin
description: Grants %{VALUE:PUMPKIN_FORTUNE} %{STAT:PUMPKIN_FORTUNE}.

name: Turbo-Warts
description: Grants %{VALUE:NETHER_WART_FORTUNE} %{STAT:NETHER_WART_FORTUNE}.

name: Turbo-Wheat
description: Grants %{VALUE:WHEAT_FORTUNE} %{STAT:WHEAT_FORTUNE}.

name: Bank
description: Saves %{VALUE:COIN_SAVE} of your coins on death. Additionally, enemies drop %{VALUE:DROPPED_COINS} when killed.

name: Bobbin Time
description: Increases all %{STAT_CATEGORY:FISHING} Stats and %{STAT:MAGIC_FIND} by %{VALUE:PER_BOBBER} per fishing bobber within %{VALUE:DISTANCE} blocks, up to %{VALUE:MAX_BOBBERS}.

name: Chimera
description: Copies %{VALUE:PET_STATS} of your active pet's stats.

name: Combo
description: Increases your damage by %{VALUE:DAMAGE_INCREASE} per kill up to %{VALUE:MAX_KILLS} kills within %{VALUE:DURATION}.

name: Fatal Tempo
description: Attacking increases your %{STAT:FEROCITY} by %{VALUE:PER_HIT} per hit, capped at %{VALUE:FEROCITY_CAP} for 3 seconds after your last attack.

name: First Impression
description: Grants %{VALUE:MELEE_SWEEP} %{STAT:SWEEP} on melee Log Breaks, and your first melee Log Break on a tree grants you %{VALUE:FIRST_HIT} %{STAT:SWEEP}.

name: Flash
description: Gain a %{VALUE:CHANCE} to instantly attract a fish.

name: Flowstate
description: Consecutive blocks broken grant %{VALUE:CONSECUTIVE_MINING_SPEED} %{STAT:MINING_SPEED}. Stops after %{VALUE:DURATION} of not mining and caps at %{VALUE:CAPPED_BLOCKS}.

name: Habanero Tactics
description:
%{SYMBOL:HABANERO} Heal %{VALUE:WAND_HEAL} more from wands.
%{SYMBOL:HABANERO} Deal %{VALUE:SLAYER_DAMAGE} damage with Slayer weapons.
%{SYMBOL:HABANERO} Gain %{VALUE:SLAYER_COMBAT_WISDOM} %{STAT:COMBAT_WISDOM} with Slayer weapons.
%{SYMBOL:HABANERO} With %{KEYWORD:SMOLDERING_POLARIZATION}, gain %{VALUE:SLAYER_MAGIC_FIND} %{STAT:MAGIC_FIND} on your slayer weapon.

name: Inferno
description: Every %{VALUE:HIT_SCALAR}th hit on a mob traps it for %{VALUE:DURATION} and deals %{VALUE:HIT_DAMAGE} of that hit's damage over the trap duration.

name: Ultimate Jerry
description: Increases the base damage of %{ITEM:ASPECT_OF_THE_JERRY} by %{VALUE:DAMAGE}.

name: Last Stand
description: Gain %{VALUE:DEFENSE_INCREASE} %{STAT:DEFENSE} when hit while below %{VALUE:LOW_HEALTH}%{SYMBOL:HEALTH}.

name: Legion
description: Increases all %{STAT_CATEGORY:COMBAT} stats and %{STAT:MAGIC_FIND} by %{VALUE:LEGION_SCALAR} per player within %{VALUE:DISTANCE} blocks of you, up to %{VALUE:MAX_PLAYERS} players.

name: Missile
description: The Log penalty on Throwing Axe is reduced by %{VALUE:REDUCED_PENALTY}.

name: No Pain No Gain
description: You have %{VALUE:CHANCE} chance to gain %{VALUE:XP_ORBS} experience orbs every time you take hits from mobs.

name: One For All
description: Removes all other enchants but increases your damage by %{VALUE:DAMAGE}.

name: Refrigerate
description: Grants %{VALUE:MANA_DEFENSE} of the mana used to cast abilities as %{STAT:DEFENSE} for %{VALUE:DURATION}, up to %{VALUE:MAX_DEFENSE} %{STAT:DEFENSE}.

name: Duplex
description:
Shoot an extra arrow dealing %{VALUE:ARROW_DAMAGE} of the first arrow's damage.
Targets hit take %{VALUE:FIRE_DAMAGE} fire damage for %{VALUE:DURATION}.

name: Rend
description:
Use Left Click ability to rip your arrows out of nearby enemies. Each arrow deals %{VALUE:LAST_CRIT_DAMAGE} of your last critical shot on the target, up to %{VALUE:MAX_ARROWS}.
%{VALUE:COOLDOWN} Cooldown.

name: Soul Eater
description: Your weapon gains %{VALUE:LAST_DAMAGE} the Damage of the latest monster killed and adds it at the end of your next critical hit.

name: Swarm
description: Increases your damage by %{VALUE:RANGE_DAMAGE} for each enemy within %{VALUE:DISTANCE} blocks. Maximum of %{VALUE:MAX_ENEMIES}.

name: The One
description: Grants %{VALUE:COLLECTION_HEALTH} %{STAT:HEALTH} and %{VALUE:COLLECTION_STRENGTH} %{STAT:STRENGTH} per maxed out collection.

name: Ultimate Wise
description: Reduces the ability mana cost of this item by %{VALUE:MANA_REDUCTION}.

name: Wisdom
description:
Gain %{VALUE:EXP_INTELLIGENCE} %{STAT:INTELLIGENCE} for every %{VALUE:LEVELS} levels of exp you have on you.
Capped at %{VALUE:INTELLIGENCE_CAP} %{STAT:INTELLIGENCE}.

name: Vampirism
description: Heals for %{VALUE:HEAL} of your missing health whenever you kill an enemy.

name: Venomous
description: Reduces the target's walk speed by %{VALUE:REDUCED} and deals %{VALUE:DPS} of your damage per second per hit, stacking globally up to %{VALUE:MAX_HITS}. Lasts %{VALUE:DURATION}.

name: Vicious
description: Grants %{VALUE:FEROCITY} %{STAT:FEROCITY}.

name: Woodsplitter
description: Increases damage dealt to %{MOB_TYPE:WOODLAND} mobs by %{VALUE:DAMAGE}.
